name: fanaticjs
description: RabbitMQ library implementing independent queues and events using fanout strategy.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test --test-reporter spec --test-concurrency 1 --experimental-test-coverage --env-file=.env test/unit/*.test.ts test/integration/*.test.ts test/e2e/*.test.ts
scripts.coverage: node --import tsx --test --test-reporter spec --test-reporter lcov --test-reporter-destination stdout --test-reporter-destination coverage/lcov.info --test-concurrency 1 --experimental-test-coverage --env-file=.env test/unit/*.test.ts test/integration/*.test.ts test/e2e/*.test.ts
scripts.coverage:lcov: node --import tsx --test --test-reporter lcov --test-reporter-destination coverage/lcov.info --test-concurrency 1 --experimental-test-coverage --env-file=.env test/unit/*.test.ts test/integration/*.test.ts test/e2e/*.test.ts
